comment_content:
assuming that this might also be an in-universe ad for Nevermore Academy as well as a teaser for us, it seems this new Principal is shifting all the blame for the events that happened last year to Weems and only Weems; the real one to blame is not mentioned at all. 

this new Principal is promoting a 'return to tradition' for Nevermore with a somewhat subtle dig at 'Normies' interactions at Nevermore, again, throwing shade at Weems, this time at her efforts to involve Nevermore students with the townsfolk, though against 'Normies' in general. this might be a basis for a conflict of sorts in Season 2, either a focus or one in the background.
reply_content: Unfortunately, there is some truth to that. Weems was so focused on maintaining relationships with the town that she unintentionally let a bigot genocidal mad woman into Nevemore and endangered the students. She had good intentions but was being too much of a people pleaser.
